_comment: Minimal hand-authored NIfTI-MRS sidecar for the svs.html demo. Contains only the fields NiiVue's signal reader consumes (SpectrometerFrequency + ResonantNucleus drive the ppm axis; DwellTime is a fallback for the NIfTI pixDim[4] spectral dwell). Do NOT replace with a raw dcm2niix dump: that re-introduces site/device/patient PII into this public demo asset (see packages/niivue/AGENTS.md signal audit notes).
